500 TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_ADMSN_CD TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_ADMSN_CD Mood: Trouble concentrating on things: P (A) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient expressed trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television. 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
9 = No response 
- = Not
